query:
SELECT 
  AVG(durationMs)/1000 as avg_seconds,
  MIN(durationMs)/1000 as min_seconds,
  MAX(durationMs)/1000 as max_seconds,
  COUNT(*) as total_cycles
FROM monitor_runs 
WHERE status = 'ok' AND durationMs IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY startedAt DESC
LIMIT 1;
